mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.code FROM myo_sys_permission p LEFT JOIN myo_sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id LEFT JOIN myo_sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT r.name FROM myo_sys_role r LEFT JOIN myo_sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT MIN(r.role_level) FROM myo_sys_role r LEFT JOIN myo_sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT u.id, u.account, u.avatar, u.create_date, u.deleted, u.email, u.last_login, u.mobile_phone_number, u.nickname, u.status, u.last_ipaddr, u.sex, u.remark FROM myo_sys_user u WHERE u.id != #{currentUserId} AND IFNULL( (SELECT MIN(r.role_level) FROM myo_sys_role r JOIN myo_sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = u.id), 99 ) > #{currentUserLevel} ORDER BY u.create_date DESC
